subject: [DCAE] Bump up to Dashboard 1.4.3
commit_message:
[DCAE] Bump up to Dashboard 1.4.3

Fixes login issue introduced by commom/pg version upgrade 
to crunchy-postgres:centos8-13.2-4.6.1

Change-Id: I31225be237d7aba4746765ef2529e8daf0ca42f8
Signed-off-by: vv770d <vv770d@att.com>
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2751

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2089/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2089/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2089/ )
